Base abstraction for configuration systems.

Contract for configuration keys.

Central access point for Alliance API components.

Represents a command handler abstraction.
AllianceCommandManager
Manages the lifecycle, storage, and lookup of custom commands registered through the Alliance API.

Manages the registration and lifecycle of Bukkit event listeners associated with Alliance extensions.
